headline: Raymond James to Expand Managed Investment Options for Advisors
summary: The firm plans to announce enhancements to its asset management services in the next 12 to 18 months, including expanded model portfolios and SMA strategies.

headline: Raymond James expands Western U.S. financial services investment banking capabilities with addition of senior banker
summary: Raymond James is growing its Financial Services Investment Banking platform throughout the West by hiring Managing Director Jimmy Troy.Troy's deep regional expertise and over 20 years of experience...
